reason: $180K RFP progressing well with a strong VP-of-Procurement champion; the open gaps are routine sales execution — the buyer's economic buyer is a CFO (not a CEO/board), and connecting to a CFO to co-build the TCO business case is explicitly VP/SVP/CRO work, not CEO work; pricing is buyer-stated Coupa-parity within budget (no exception beyond delegated authority) and this is not a marquee, CEO-defining account, so no CEO-to-CEO lever or beyond-authority commitment is required.
